speaker: Argo
text: "Ah, Lord Baten."

speaker: Baten
text: "Oh?"

speaker: Lord Baten
text:
Feeling the need to relieve myself, I head to the restroom.
I enter right as Lord Baten is pulling down his zipper.

speaker: Baten
text: "Oh, you gotta piss too? Let's do it together!" *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: "Sure, if you don’t mind."
I stand next to him and pull my own zipper down. Then, I hear the sound of flowing liquid coming from his direction. *sigh*

speaker: Baten
text: "Ah~! There's only so many places you can take a leak while on land. What a pain in the ass!"

speaker: Argo
text: "That’s just how it is, Lord Baten."

speaker: Baten
text: "You can do it anywhere off a boat when yer at sea!"

speaker: Argo
text: "Yeah, I guess so."

speaker: Argo
text: “(...This reminds me, what do dragons have going on downstairs?)"

speaker: Unknown
text: Without even paying attention to whatever he’s talking about, my curiosity about the source of the splashing sound gets better of me.
I attempt to take a quick peek, but his thick arm blocks my view. *sigh*

speaker: Sebastian
text: “As I’m feeling disappointed, Lord Baten and I finish our business.”

speaker: Baten
text: "What? You still wanna talk?" *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: "Ah... You can tell?"

speaker: Baten
text: "Fine with me. I'll keep ya company now that I’m feelin’ better!"

speaker: Argo
text: "Thank you."

speaker: Argo
text: "Why did you create Ludvigo?"

speaker: Baten
text: "Well, I didn't."

speaker: Argo
text: "What? But I heard about how insistent you were in requesting to start a country..."

speaker: Baten
text: "Who the hell told ya that!?"

speaker: Argo
text: "Is it true?"

speaker: Baten
text: "I... guess."

speaker: Argo
text: "So I was right, wasn't I?" *sigh*

speaker: Baten
text: "I mean, at first it was just a group of people livin' on boats. So I said why not just make it a country?"

speaker: Argo
text: "I see... But why were they living on boats in the first place?"

speaker: Baten
text: "There's several reasons. Some were tribes livin' on boats, while others were exiled criminals who went into hidin'."

speaker: Baten
text: "But besides those, some were just poor. Couldn’t even afford a doctor if they got sick."

speaker: Baten
text: "So, I brought us all together as a country, makin' it possible for us to join in international trade and build a proper society." *sigh*

speaker: Baten
text: "By makin' money, they can see a doctor. By engagin' in trade, they can have a stable life. That’s how our population grew." *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: "And now it’s a world-renowned power…"

speaker: Baten
text: "Now we're part of more than half the world’s maritime trade!"

speaker: Argo
text: “Y-you’re amazing...” *sigh*

speaker: Baten
text: "Wahaha! Yes, praise me more!"

speaker: Argo
text: "I can't believe he built a country all by himself. Dragons really are incredible...!"

speaker: Argo
text: "You're so strong and smart. Just how I’d expect a dragon to be!"

speaker: Baten
text: "Gahaha! It's nothing!"

speaker: Argo
text: "Even if us knights all work together, we're still no match for you..."

speaker: Baten
text: "You think so~? I'm glad ya know just how great I am~."

speaker: Argo
text: "That’s why there’s so many things I want to know about dragons…" *sigh*

speaker: Baten
text: "Right! Ask whatever ya want!"

speaker: Argo
text: "What are dragons' crotches like?" *sigh*

speaker: Baten
text: "Hey!! Is that some kinda joke!!" *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: "But you said I could ask anything, didn't you!?"

speaker: Baten
text: "Still, there's some things ya shouldn’t ask!"

speaker: Argo
text: "But I have to know!!"

speaker: Baten
text: "Too bad!!"

speaker: Argo
text: "Aww. Come on~~~…"

speaker: Baten
text: "That ain’t gonna work on me!"

speaker: Argo
text: "Now I really want to know..."

speaker: Argo
text: "It’s about time for me to head out."

speaker: Baten
text: "Sure. Just ask if ya ever wanna piss with me again!"

speaker: Argo
text: "Uh, yeah. Sure..."
